summary: Created Low-Level Design for FR-PERF-001 (Instanced Mesh Rendering). The LLD defines component architecture, data models, sequence diagrams, error handling, and testing strategy to achieve ≥30 FPS with 500 bricks using Three.js InstancedMesh.

artifacts.name: Low-Level Design Document
artifacts.description: Component architecture, data models, sequence diagrams, error handling, and testing strategy for instanced mesh rendering

artifacts.name: Design PR
artifacts.description: PR containing the LLD for human review

human_review_required.reason: Design must be approved before implementation proceeds

recommended_actions: Review the LLD document for technical correctness and completeness
Verify that the design meets the acceptance criteria of FR-PERF-001 and NFR-PERF-001
Check alignment with the Technical Architecture (docs/TECHNICAL_ARCHITECTURE.md) and PRD
If approved, merge the PR to main and hand off to frontend-test agent
If changes are requested, add comments on the PR and reassign to design agent
